strengths: Twenty-year track record across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems demonstrates genuine technical breadth and adaptability
Recent MCP code generator and agentic workflow tooling work at re:cinq shows emerging, hands-on AI-adjacent technical engagement
Founded GISCollective and delivered community workshops, evidencing self-direction and some knowledge-sharing initiative
concerns: AI expertise is nascent and shallow: AI-related work appears only in the most recent role (April 2025, approximately three months), with no prior shipped AI products, publications, patents, or external recognition that would credibly qualify him to advise strategic enterprise customers on cutting-edge AI adoption

Career has plateaued at Senior/Staff developer scope with no evidence of director-level IC activity — no strategic advisory engagements, no cloud product roadmap ownership, no history of shaping technical direction across organizations or inspiring external partners

Academic credentials fall well short of the preferred profile: two bachelor's degrees (one in Fine Arts, one CS from a small regional university), no Master's or PhD in any AI-related field, and public-speaking history limited to introductory Selenium and web fundamentals workshops
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable generalist craftsman whose technical breadth is real but whose profile falls materially short of this director-level AI strategy role on every critical dimension: his entire AI engagement amounts to roughly three months of MCP tooling work with no shipped AI products, no recognised research, and no track record advising enterprise partners; his titles have never exceeded Senior or Staff developer with no evidence of strategic IC scope, external evangelism, or cross-organizational technical influence; and his academic background — a Fine Arts degree and a CS degree from a small regional institution, no advanced AI credentials — does not support the credibility required to advise sophisticated cloud and AI customers or inspire disruptive endeavors at scale. The overall profile is that of a skilled practitioner, not a principal-level AI strategist.
